candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; preferred over subtotal/duplicate total.
Also a valid total revenue line, but appears to duplicate Revenue exactly.
Not revenue; this is COGS.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Cost of Revenue
candidates.why: Not revenue; this is a cost component.

candidates.row_label: Rep. Op. Exp. Excl. Cost of Sale/Revenue
candidates.why: Operating expense metric, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not income statement revenue.

variables.notes: Using Revenue as primary and Total Revenue as fallback/priority alternative because labels may change over time; values are identical in preview.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Cost of Revenue
candidates.why: Only a labor subcomponent of cost of revenue, not full COGS.
Inventory asset, not income statement COGS.

variables.notes: Candidate list clearly misses the correct full COGS label. Selected 'Cost of product sales' from the full Income Statement preview because it is the direct cost-of-sales line. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Cost of product sales

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A/administrative overhead line; best core SG&A choice.
Subcomponent of SG&A; prefer the broader explicit SG&A row instead of components when populated.
SG&A subcomponent; useful only if broader SG&A row were absent or incomplete.
Could be overhead-related, but not clearly standalone SG&A if broader SG&A row already exists.
D&A component should be excluded from XSGA_COMPONENTS.

variables.notes: Selected explicit SG&A row 'General and administrative expenses'. Added separate 'Research and development expenses' as well because R&D is reported separately and does not appear embedded in the selected G&A line; PROF uses (XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD), so including R&D here allows later subtraction. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Research and development expenses

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line; best match.
R&D subcomponent only, not full R&D expense.
R&D subcomponent and amortization specifically, not full R&D expense.
R&D D&A subcomponent only, not full R&D expense.
Semantic match but appears to be an empty supplemental duplicate; less preferable than the populated main line.
Balance sheet asset/receivable-related line, not period R&D expense.
Capitalized/intangible balance sheet gross amount, not income statement expense.
Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet accumulated depreciation, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Using the dedicated R&D expense line as primary. Included 'Research & Development Exp' as lower-priority fallback because labels may vary across periods, even though the preview shows the main line populated and the supplemental line empty.

candidates.why: Broader finance cost bucket; acceptable fallback if specific interest expense unavailable.
Most specific and preferred interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest line but appears narrower and often empty.
Interest-related line; useful fallback for periods where borrowing interest line may not capture all interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest line; narrower and appears empty.
Generic preferred label if populated, but preview appears empty.

variables.notes: Priority order prefers the most specific interest expense line, then other interest-specific labels, then broad financial expenses as fallback.

candidates.why: Not total book equity; unrelated investment/equity-account line.
Equity component only, not total equity.
Best available total equity attributable to shareholders; preferred for BE.
Would include minority interest if present; use only if no cleaner shareholders' equity line exists.
Balancing/subtotal artifact, not preferred.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

variables.notes: Preferred shareholder equity line selected. This avoids potential double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: This is total equity including any minority interest, not a standalone minority-interest line; using it for MIB would double count against BE.

variables.notes: No standalone minority interest/non-controlling interest line is present. Since BE uses 'Total shareholders equity', MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.
